scripts.test:integration: npm run test:build-bundle && npx playwright test
scripts.test:integration:ui: npm run test:build-bundle && npx playwright test --ui
scripts.test:integration:headed: npm run test:build-bundle && npx playwright test --headed
scripts.test:integration:debug: npm run test:build-bundle && npx playwright test --debug
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration
